results.title: Independent Financial Group LLC Purchases Shares of 7,476 American Express Company $AXP
results.description: Independent Financial Group LLC acquired a new position in American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) in the 1st quarter, according to the company in its most recent Form 13F filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The institutional investor acquired 7,476 shares of the payment services company’s stock, valued at approximately $2,261,000. A number of other [...]

results.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL Shares Sold by Planning Center Inc.
results.description: Planning Center Inc. cut its holdings in shares of Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL – Free Report) by 5.6% during the first quarter, according to the company in its most recent Form 13F filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The fund owned 31,895 shares of the iPhone maker’s stock after selling 1,903 shares during the period. [...]

results.title: Ronaldo Nazario predicts a comfortable Spain win over Argentina in FIFA World Cup 2026 final
results.description: Brazil legend Ronaldo Nazario backs Spain to beat Argentina comfortably in the FIFA World Cup 2026 final, praising Luis de la Fuente's unbeaten side.

results.title: Point to prove: Finals to arrive early with Izak Rankine to confront Collingwood
results.description: The eighth-placed Magpies finally get an opponent worthy of a final when they play the in-form Adelaide who, it mustn’t be forgotten, will have Izak Rankine in the team.

results.title: England rugby star mocks Argentina with Enzo Fernandez-inspired celebration
results.description: Ellis Genge couldn't resist taking a swipe as England's rugby stars did what their footballing equivalents couldn't by beating Argentina.
